heading: Seizure; appraisement
label: 1606 Seizure; appraisement
text: The appropriate customs officer shall determine the domestic value, at the time and place of appraisement, of any vessel, vehicle, aircraft, merchandise, or baggage seized under the customs laws.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , .
